title: otholobium fruticans
intro: Otholobium fruticans, also known as the 'Baboon Climber', is a flowering plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Otholobium fruticans are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and heal various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often dried and used as a decoction or infusion to harness its medicinal benefits.
